title: Limit of elements and connections in the PRO plan
excerpt:

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Due to the large changes in limits due to Monday DB in the Enterprise plan, I ask for an increase in the PRO plan limits for the number of connections between boards and the number of elements on one board.

We do not need as many as 60 connections per board or 100,000 elements per board (soon 1M per board) in the Enterprise plan, but 10,000 elements per board and 20 connections is definitely too few for the PRO plan.

These proportions between the basic plan, PRO and Enterprise have been seriously disrupted.

A solution to this problem would be useful. In my opinion, the PRO plan should be at least doubled in this regard or include half the Enterprise plan limit.
